name: flow
description: Managed-autonomy workflow for Claude Code. Ships /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike + /flow:staff-review (four-lens parallel) + /flow:security-review + /flow:accessibility-review + /flow:verify-build + /flow:workflow-help + /flow:doctor, alongside the skeptical-reviewer surface (/flow:audit-plan, /flow:audit-completion, /flow:critique-plan, /flow:log-disagreement). Plus planner + docs context-isolation agents, four portable rules (general / plan-discipline / documentation / exploration), memory-corpus tool, flow.config.json JSON Schema (21 slots), and default hooks. v1.4.2 fixes a session-transcript discovery bug in extract_session.py — the cwd→project-dir encoding now matches Claude Code (all non-alphanumerics map to '-', not just '/') and discovery prefers the exact CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID, so the audit/critique reviewers no longer silently run context-starved from worktree or dotted-path sessions. v1.4.1 makes /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike write a per-step `## Flow run` PR body documenting the full loop run — each step marked ✓ ran / skipped-with-reason (mode- and config-dependent), with a Notable cell carrying genuine signal (plan-critic catch, load-bearing decision, fixed BLOCKER, real review finding) or '—' when routine; the ship agent is instructed not to manufacture filler, follow-ups stay canonical in the roadmap/plan docs, and the PR is still never merged. Replaces the generic Reviews blurb. v1.4.0 makes /flow:ship auto-invocable (disable-model-invocation flipped to false): the agent auto-advances from Step 8 into the ship pipeline when the ship-readiness predicate holds (every spec-walk checkbox checked, no open BLOCKER, no unresolved MEDIUM/LOW assumption, /flow:verify-build would return PASS — not merely 'didn't fail') and the FB-0011 risk gate is clear; otherwise it stops and presents. Skipped-verify cases (library/none platform, doc-only diff) and spike mode stay manual; ship-spike keeps disable-model-invocation true; the plan-approval (Step 2) and merge (Step 11) human gates are untouched and ship still never merges. v1.3.0 adds /flow:verify-build — plan-driven behavioral verification gate at /flow:ship Step 2. Wraps bundled /verify (transitively /run + /run-skill-generator) with criteria extraction from **Spec-walk:** checkboxes, adversarial transformation, per-dimension parallel judges (PASS/FAIL/Unknown with two-citation evidence), Unknown-blocking gate per FB-0011 (autonomy bar — ESCALATE on uncertainty), and structured findings buffer routed to /flow:ship Step 4a synthesis. Closes the static-analysis-only gap in the loop's verification surface (Potemkin-interface / hallucinated-success class). Inherits FB-0012 bounded-retry contract from PR M: judge runs single-pass; budget cap (verifyBudgetCalls slot) forces Unknown on overrun; reward-hacking guards (no test-disabling, no @ts-ignore/eslint-disable) baked into the adversarial transformation. Adds 4 schema slots: platform (autodetect or explicit web/ios/android/tauri/cli/library/none), verifyEnabled, verifyFindingsPath, verifyBudgetCalls. ship-spike Step 2 invokes verify-build in spike-mode (3-check rubric). doctor Check 5.3 detects whether /run-skill-generator has been run for the project. v1.2.6 adds bounded-retry mechanical preflight to /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike (new `preflightCmd` slot at Step 1c; N≤3 retries with diff-hash oscillation detection; loops only on externally-verifiable exit codes per Anthropic's evaluator-optimizer guidance — reviewer outputs at Step 2 stay single-pass to prevent reward hacking). v1.2.5 sharpens the reviewer pipeline along adversarial dimensions: auditor + plan-critic gain a prove-or-disprove self-check (findings must survive an attempt to cite the specific session text or third citation that would invalidate them); lens-staff-engineer reads adversarially ('assume the diff is broken — what's the most likely break?'); /flow:security-review shifts to red-team identity with a trace-input-source-back disprove step. Plan-critic also gains fan-out hunt vocabulary in Internal incoherence (PR-G FOLLOW-UP #5). v1.2.3 adds consistency discipline (FB-0010) — defense for the most-recurring bug class flow's own development surfaced (silent-skip on edge case + fan-out contradiction): lens-staff-engineer hunts both; /flow:doctor adds Check 2.5 for documented-slot-count vs schema source-of-truth; workflow.md Step 4 names the discipline. Canonical 11-step loop documented at plugins/flow/docs/workflow.md; project-specific values come from flow.config.json (schema at plugins/flow/schema/flow.config.schema.json).
